overview: EventIQ is a Zoho-inspired calm SaaS platform for offline event planning in Dehradun. Vendors can register, manage their profiles, and be matched with event planners across 16 service categories — all offline with no external API calls.
features: Vendor dashboard with profile view and edit
Pop-up modal form for editing vendor details
Vendor nav link visible only to vendor accounts
Dark/light mode with abstract blob animations
